title: athyrium rigidulum
intro: Athyrium rigidulum, also known as the brittle lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. Its medicinal properties include the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Athyrium rigidulum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate respiratory issues and support overall well-being.
